reviews.review_description: So simple in concept but there is fun to be had for younger (and older players) alike and at the ridiculous price of 59p your getting so much value for money. Its had an update adding so many more levels and even an experimental hand tracking. If you never tried hand tracking in VR then here is your ticket!
Who gave it a 4? Must not know how to stack blocks.. this is amazing! For a buck it's the shirt!  Like real life Jenga is what I plan I love this thing.

reviews.review_title: Bought it for my better half
reviews.review_description: She enjoys spatial type games and this one is fun!
